dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} been lifted. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} neutralized, and the afflicted are returning to their senses one by one.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} administered the cure successfully, and {quest_ally} reports that {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} recovering well. The nightmares have stopped, the aggression has faded. Whatever was emanating from near {location_hint} has gone silent.
dialogueChunks.outro: You walked into something that defied understanding and came out the other side with a solution. {player_name}, the settlement will never forget this.

dialogueChunks.intro: The spread has stopped, though not everyone was saved. {quest_focus_The} claimed some victims before you could reach the source, and those losses weigh on all of us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} says the surviving afflicted will recover in time. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} been contained if not fully destroyed. {target_npc} is maintaining a watch on the area near {location_hint} to ensure {quest_stakes_the} don't relapse.
dialogueChunks.outro: It's a bittersweet ending. You saved many, {player_name}, even if you couldn't save everyone.

dialogueChunks.intro: The symptoms have receded, but {quest_focus_the} left marks that may never fully fade. Some of the afflicted see the world differently now: not worse, just changed.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} says the exposure altered something fundamental in {quest_stakes_the}. {quest_ally} has begun documenting what the afflicted remember, hoping to understand {quest_threat_the} well enough to prevent it from returning. The source near {location_hint} is dormant, not destroyed.
dialogueChunks.outro: You did what could be done with the tools we had. The mystery of what caused this may outlast us all, but at least we survived it. Thank you, {player_name}.
